sentence_reviews.text: Model registries and MLOps systems version models, adapters, datasets, evaluations, approvals, lineage, deployment targets, and rollback state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Object storage, sharding & checkpoints
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDIA supports storage and distributed data-system concerns broadly.

sentence_reviews.text: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Object storage, sharding & checkpoints, Workflow, cluster & job orchestration.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
